description: Locked CI invariants with explicit pass/fail criteria.

invariants.name: PR-only output policy for automation events
invariants.criteria: For automation events (schedule/workflow_dispatch/repository_dispatch), AUTOMATION_OUTPUT_POLICY must equal 'pr-only'.

invariants.name: Hermetic fingerprint match against router-pinned value
invariants.criteria: HERMETIC_FINGERPRINT must be set and match ROUTER_PINNED_FINGERPRINT exactly.

invariants.name: No outbound network in hermetic mode
invariants.criteria: When HERMETIC_MODE=true, OUTBOUND_NETWORK_ALLOWED must be false.

invariants.name: Policy-zoning reviewer quorum + required checks
invariants.criteria: POLICY_ZONE_APPROVALS and POLICY_ZONE_QUORUM must be set and approvals must be >= quorum; POLICY_REQUIRED_CHECKS_PASSED must be true.

invariants.name: Deterministic artifact hash verification
invariants.criteria: EXPECTED_ARTIFACT_HASH and ACTUAL_ARTIFACT_HASH must be set and equal exactly.
